            to: tx.to,
            data: tx.data,
            value: tx.value,
            ...(tx.maxFeePerGas && { maxFeePerGas: tx.maxFeePerGas }),
            ...(tx.maxPriorityFeePerGas && { maxPriorityFeePerGas: tx.maxPriorityFeePerGas }),
          })
